title: Monthly Sea Fisheries Statistics January 2025
body: "Highlights   The total quantity of landings by UK vessels (tonnes) decreased in January 2025 compared to 2024, down 2%. However, the value of landings in January 2025 (£176m) increased compared to 2024 up by 25%. Landings in January 2025 comprised mostly of Pelagic species (83%). This was driven by high landings of Mackerel which is a typically heavily targeted fishery in the winter months. Pelagic species also comprised the majority of the value landed (76%).  "
